title: Processing persistent unique identifiers is security-sensitive
description: Handling persistent unique identifiers, such as device IDs, can expose sensitive user information if not managed securely. This rule detects when code processes persistent unique identifiers, which may lead to privacy risks or data exposure if not properly protected. Always follow best practices for privacy and data protection.
recommendation: Avoid processing persistent unique identifiers unless absolutely necessary. If required, ensure data is anonymized and access is restricted to trusted code only.

compliant:
// Use anonymized or ephemeral identifiers instead of persistent device IDs
// Only access unique identifiers with explicit user consent and strong protection

checks.message: Avoid processing persistent unique identifiers unless absolutely necessary. If required, ensure data is anonymized and access is restricted to trusted code only.
